summary: Audited ~50 project documentation files. Updated 26 docs to reflect current codebase state (v3.4.1). Key fixes: version 3.3.0→3.4.1, MAX_PARAMETERS 2048→4096, SnapshotBank size ~97KB→~197KB, removed non-existent IMCPServer/VAEMorphEngine references, fixed broken doc links in README, corrected MSVC_MP default, updated true-peak specs (96-tap→256-tap). Historical audit/spec docs preserved at their original version context.
remaining_issues: CMakeLists.txt says VERSION 3.4.0 but Version.h says 3.4.1 — minor inconsistency in codebase, not a doc issue
